languages.text: "Мы с вами уже говорили, помните? Все это уже происходило!"

traits.locale_text: [Драфт] Мы уже говорили, я даже вас убил!

languages.text: "We've spoken before, remember? All of this has happened before!"
languages.original_text: "Мы с вами уже говорили, помните? Все это уже происходило!"

traits.locale_text: "We've spoken before, remember? All of this has happened before!"
"We've spoken before, remember? All of this has happened before!"
"We've spoken before, remember? All of this has happened before!"

languages.text: “我们之前交谈过，你还记得吗？这一切早就发生过！”
languages.original_text: "We've spoken before, remember? All of this has happened before!"

traits.locale_text: “我们之前交谈过，你还记得吗？这一切早就发生过！”

languages.text: « Nous nous sommes déjà parlé, vous ne vous en souvenez pas ? Tout ceci s'est déjà produit ! »
languages.original_text: "We've spoken before, remember? All of this has happened before!"

traits.locale_text: « Nous nous sommes déjà parlé, vous ne vous en souvenez pas ? Tout ceci s'est déjà produit ! »

languages.text: "Daha önce konuşmuştuk, hatırlıyor musun? Bütün bunlar daha önce de yaşandı!"
languages.original_text: "We've spoken before, remember? All of this has happened before!"

traits.locale_text: "Daha önce konuşmuştuk, hatırlıyor musun? Bütün bunlar daha önce de yaşandı!"

languages.text: «Hemos hablado antes, ¿recuerda? ¡Todo esto ya ha sucedido antes!».
languages.original_text: "We've spoken before, remember? All of this has happened before!"

traits.locale_text: «Hemos hablado antes, ¿recuerda? ¡Todo esto ya ha sucedido antes!».

languages.text: "Wir haben uns schon einmal unterhalten, erinnert Ihr Euch? All das ist schon einmal passiert!"
languages.original_text: "We've spoken before, remember? All of this has happened before!"

traits.locale_text: "Wir haben uns schon einmal unterhalten, erinnert Ihr Euch? All das ist schon einmal passiert!"

languages.text: 「前に話したよね？全部、前にあったことだ！」
languages.original_text: "We've spoken before, remember? All of this has happened before!"

traits.locale_text: 「前に話したよね？全部、前にあったことだ！」
